MELItem.Title: Power Electronics Cooling System (PECS) Temperature Control Systems

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided associated temperature control valve is deactivated open.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate inoperative PECS temperature control valve in open position (AMM DDG 21-81-06).

ListItem.Para: For left loop:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV-L and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to temperature control valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector to left liquid cooling temperature control valve.

Note.Para: The LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV L status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the OPN position.
For right loop:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV-R and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to temperature control valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector to right liquid cooling temperature control valve.

Note.Para: The LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV R status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the OPN position.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided associated temperature control valve is deactivated open.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate inoperative PECS temperature control valve in open position and confirm PECS fluid level is adequate (AMM DDG 21-81-06).

ListItem.Para: Secure temperature control valve in open position:
For left loop:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV-L and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to temperature control valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector to left liquid cooling temperature control valve.

Note.Para: The LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV L status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the OPN position.
For right loop:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV-R and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to temperature control valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector to right liquid cooling temperature control valve.

Note.Para: The LIQUID CLG TEMP CTRL VLV R status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the OPN position.
Confirm PECS fluid level is adequate:
On ELEC SYS IND & CTRL (ESIC) maintenance page, confirm ATRUCs are closed.
On MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, confirm left and right ram fans are operating.
Confirm both PECS loops have been operating for at least 10 minutes.
On POWER ELEC COOLING maintenance page, confirm opposite PECS loop has reached steady temperature.

Note.Para: If starting PECS loop from a cold or hot soak condition, time to reach steady temperature could be longer.

ListItem.Para: On POWER ELEC COOLING maintenance page, confirm RESERVOIR POSITION 1 and RESERVOIR POSITION 2 for the affected PECS loop are between 4 and 6 inches (10.2 and 15.2 centimeters).
Service PECS loop as required.
